# Notte — Browser Platform for AI Agents
# https://notte.cc | https://docs.notte.cc

For the complete self-contained reference (also contains this file's content):
https://docs.notte.cc/.well-known/skills/notte/SKILL.md

## Documentation Pages

- /docs — Overview: what Notte is, core capabilities (sessions, agents, scraping), quick code example
- /docs/quickstart — Step-by-step setup: create account, set NOTTE_API_KEY, install SDK, run first session, try web agent
- /docs/sessions — Browser sessions via CDP: connect_over_cdp() pattern, Session() params, lifecycle, anti-detection
- /docs/agents — Web agents: client.Agent() + agent.run(task=, url=) with kwargs (not positional string), max_steps config
- /docs/scraping — Structured extraction: client.scrape(url=, response_format=PydanticModel, instructions=), returns typed data
- /docs/troubleshooting — Error catalog: NOTTE_API_KEY not set, CDP -32601, session timeouts, wrong param names, agent.run() TypeError
- /docs/api-reference — Full SDK reference with parameter tables, types, defaults, return types

## Installation

```bash
pip install notte-sdk playwright
export NOTTE_API_KEY=your-key-from-console.notte.cc
```

## Complete API Reference

### NotteClient(api_key: str | None = None)
- api_key: falls back to NOTTE_API_KEY env var

### client.Session(open_viewer=False, idle_timeout_minutes=30, max_duration_minutes=120)
- open_viewer (bool, default False): print live view URL for debugging
- idle_timeout_minutes (int, default 30): close after N minutes idle
- max_duration_minutes (int, default 120): hard session time limit
- Returns: Session context manager
- session.cdp_url() → str: CDP WebSocket URL for Playwright

### client.Agent(session, max_steps=5)
- session (Session): an active Notte session (required)
- max_steps (int, default 5): max navigation steps

### agent.run(task, url) → str
- task (str): natural language task description (REQUIRED, keyword arg)
- url (str): starting URL (REQUIRED, keyword arg)
- IMPORTANT: takes kwargs, NOT positional string. Use agent.run(task="...", url="...")
- Returns: str (agent's response text)

### client.scrape(url, response_format, instructions) → ScrapeResult
- url (str): page to scrape (required)
- response_format (type[BaseModel]): Pydantic model for output schema (required)
- instructions (str): what to extract in natural language (required)
- Returns: ScrapeResult with result.data (parsed Pydantic model instance)

## Full Working Examples

### Browser Session (Playwright over CDP)

```python
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright
from notte_sdk import NotteClient

client = NotteClient()

with client.Session() as session:
    cdp_url = session.cdp_url()
    with sync_playwright() as p:
        browser = p.chromium.connect_over_cdp(cdp_url)
        page = browser.contexts[0].pages[0]
        page.goto("https://news.ycombinator.com")
        print(page.title())
        page.screenshot(path="screenshot.png")
```

### Web Agent

```python
from notte_sdk import NotteClient

client = NotteClient()

with client.Session() as session:
    agent = client.Agent(session=session, max_steps=5)
    response = agent.run(
        task="Find the top 5 stories on Hacker News",
        url="https://news.ycombinator.com"
    )
    print(response)
```

### Scraping with Pydantic

```python
from pydantic import BaseModel
from notte_sdk import NotteClient

class Story(BaseModel):
    title: str
    url: str
    points: int

class Feed(BaseModel):
    stories: list[Story]

client = NotteClient()
result = client.scrape(
    url="https://news.ycombinator.com",
    response_format=Feed,
    instructions="Extract the top 5 posts"
)
for i, s in enumerate(result.data.stories, 1):
    print(f"{i}. {s.points}pts - {s.title}")
```

## Common Errors

- NOTTE_API_KEY is NOT SET → export NOTTE_API_KEY=your-key
- 'Page.enable' not found (CDP -32601) → use connect_over_cdp() not connect(), use p.chromium not p.firefox
- TypeError on agent.run() → use kwargs: agent.run(task="...", url="...") not agent.run("...")
- timeoutMinutes has no effect → use idle_timeout_minutes and max_duration_minutes
- ModuleNotFoundError notte_sdk → pip install notte-sdk (requires Python >= 3.11)
- ModuleNotFoundError playwright → pip install playwright (only needed for browser sessions)

## Pricing

- Browser: $0.05/hour
- Proxy: $10/GB
- Agent tokens: pass-through (no markup)
- Free tier: 100 browser hours, 5 concurrent sessions, no credit card
